themes: Long-tenured frustration across franchise and multi-family verticals: The majority of contacts have waited well over 90 days—many beyond 200—with repeat accounts like Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn, and Avenue5 Residential appearing multiple times, signaling unresolved or recurring product pain points within these organizations.

Manager-heavy backlog with limited Administrator visibility: Nearly all contacts are Managers focused on day-to-day location and reporting workflows, with only a handful of Administrators, suggesting the product feedback pipeline is capturing operational friction but may be under-indexed on executive-level governance and ROI concerns that could accelerate roadmap prioritization.

Vertical clustering reveals systemic product gaps: Contacts group into clear verticals—hospitality (Holiday Inn, Cruise Planners, Travel Leaders), multi-family residential (Avenue5, Willow Bridge, LivCor, Highmark), fitness/wellness (Orangetheory, Anytime Fitness, Burn Boot Camp), and QSR/franchise (Subway, Ford, Scooter's Coffee)—indicating that unresolved issues likely reflect vertical-specific workflow or reporting needs rather than isolated one-off requests.
